headline: Jim Cramer on Dollar General: “We See If It’s as Good as Dollar Tree”
summary: Dollar General Corporation (NYSE:DG) was among the stocks Jim Cramer was focused on, as he discussed Mad Money’s latest game plan for the week. headline: Stocks Set to Open Higher as AI Optimism Overshadows Fresh U.S.-Iran Hostilities, Jobs Data Awaited
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are up +0.31%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are up +0.23% this morning as optimism surrounding artificial intelligence helped offset concerns about renewed U.S.-Iran tensions.
